schemes.title: PM-YASASVI Scholarship
schemes.desc: For youth up to 29 years with family income below ₹2.5L. Annual scholarship for higher education.

schemes.title: Gig Worker ID + PM-JAY
schemes.desc: Government gig worker card enabling PM-JAY health insurance (₹5L coverage) and social security.

schemes.title: Startup India Seed Fund
schemes.desc: Up to ₹20L grant for registered startups. Your freelance business may qualify if registered.

schemes.title: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
schemes.desc: Credit at 5% interest, skill training stipend, and digital payment incentives for professionals.
